mapper.sql: order_id, user_id, order_type, total_amount, pay_amount, order_status, pay_type, pay_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (order_id, user_id, order_type, total_amount, pay_amount, order_status, contact_name, contact_phone, remark) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{orderType}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET order_status = 3 WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND order_status = 1
